## Overview
Please refer to the directions provided in the checklist as available in the documents required tab 

## Visa guidelines for Scholars proceeding to India on Fulbright Nehru Scholarships.
Please note that No Visa fees shall be charged for issuance of visas to Fulbright-Nehru Scholarship awardees and their dependents.Fulbright- Nehru Scholarship awardees and their official dependent should submit their visa applications directly at the Embassy in Washington DC or respective Indian Consulates in USA as per consular jurisdiction. Detailed guidelines are available at the website of the Embassy/ Consulate under Fulbright Scholarships.  Please contact visa1.washington@mea.gov.in for further query

## Visa Fees
If you would like to use VFS courier service for return of your applicant, you
                                      will need add USD 18 to the total payment to be paid while making your payment.
                                    
Fees to be paid via Money order /Cashier check in the favor of “VFS Services
                                      (USA) Inc.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2s3Q9xal77YoXeQ6sg5Xm/87290baeadbfdc6c21d9409e89af251c/student-visa-checklist-updated.pdf)

[Table:    Student Visa]

[Table:    Emergency Service]

Note
-  If you would like to use VFS courier service for return of your
                                        PASSPORT, you will need to add USD 18 as courier charges to the
                                        total amount mentioned above i.e. USD 218.90 for emergency services applied on
                                        Weekend and Embassy/Consulate Holiday. Hence total amount payable will be USD
                                        236.90 for emergency services applied on Weekend and Embassy/Consulate Holiday.
                                      
Fees to be paid via Money order /Banker check in the favor of “VFS Services
                                        (USA) Inc. Personal checks are not accepted
If you prefer to use your own courier service, please submit a prepaid courier
                                        label and envelope with your application. If you choose this option, then your
                                        total amount payable will be USD 218.90
visa_types.overview:
Overview
With effect from 27 December 2023 (12:01 AM Eastern Standard Time), the outsourcing service provider – VFS Global – will start accepting all visa applications, including Emergency Entry Visa applications strictly as per the emergency criteria set out on this page. The applicants can now obtain regular Entry Visas through VFS Global without submission of any emergency documentation or reasons for travel to India subject to other eligibility conditions.
The Emergency Visa service is only for US passport holders of Indian origin and their family members required to visit India due to a genuine family emergency, such as critical illness or death of a family member. Documentary evidence will need to be provided.
The non-emergency visa applicants can apply for a regular Visa through VFS Global, without submission of any emergency documentation or reason for travel to India, subject to eligibility conditions. Processing of such applications will be as per normal procedures.
Emergency Service has an additional fee that the Embassy/Consulates charges to expedite the visa application process. Applicants have to apply for:
- ‘Emergency - Entry Visa’ for 6 months Single/Multiple Entry
Note:
- Emergency Visa will be granted subject to submission of complete documentation and the Embassy/Consulate may ask for additional documentation in certain cases.
- Applicants are advised not to make any travel plans before issuance of visa.
- Emergency Visa will be issued for a maximum of six month’s duration. The duration of Visa granted by the Embassy will be at the sole discretion of the Embassy/Consulates.
- The Embassy/Consulate will have the final authority for grant of emergency visa subject to eligibility & VFS Global and none of its staff has any role in the decision-making process.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
With effect from 27 December 2023 (12:01 AM Eastern Standard Time), the outsourcing service provider – VFS Global – will start accepting all visa applications, including Emergency Entry Visa applications strictly as per the emergency criteria set out on this page. The applicants can now obtain regular Entry Visas through VFS Global without submission of any emergency documentation or reasons for travel to India subject to other eligibility conditions.
The Emergency Visa service is only for US passport holders of Indian origin and their family members required to visit India due to a genuine family emergency, such as critical illness or death of a family member. Documentary evidence will need to be provided.
The non-emergency visa applicants can apply for a regular Visa through VFS Global, without submission of any emergency documentation or reason for travel to India, subject to eligibility conditions. Processing of such applications will be as per normal procedures.
Emergency Service has an additional fee that the Embassy/Consulates charges to expedite the visa application process. Applicants have to apply for:
- ‘Emergency - Entry Visa’ for 6 months Single/Multiple Entry
Note:
- Emergency Visa will be granted subject to submission of complete documentation and the Embassy/Consulate may ask for additional documentation in certain cases.
- Applicants are advised not to make any travel plans before issuance of visa.
- Emergency Visa will be issued for a maximum of six month’s duration. The duration of Visa granted by the Embassy will be at the sole discretion of the Embassy/Consulates.
- The Embassy/Consulate will have the final authority for grant of emergency visa subject to eligibility & VFS Global and none of its staff has any role in the decision-making process.

## Fees
If submitted to VFS India Consular Application Centre

[Table:    Emergency Service]

Note
-  If you would like to use VFS courier service for return of your
                                        PASSPORT, you will need to add USD 18 as courier charges to the
                                        total amount mentioned above i.e. USD 218.90 for emergency services applied on
                                        Weekend and Embassy/Consulate Holiday. Hence total amount payable will be USD
                                        236.90 for emergency services applied on Weekend and Embassy/Consulate Holiday.
                                      
Fees to be paid via Money order /Banker check in the favor of “VFS Services
                                        (USA) Inc. Personal checks are not accepted
If you prefer to use your own courier service, please submit a prepaid courier
                                        label and envelope with your application. If you choose this option, then your
                                        total amount payable will be USD 218.90

## Documents Required
Checklist for Emergency-Entry Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/70gwnhkILqUx8g2DrKjf0O/995a688e6755daa0753a0428d47ab25c/emergency-entry-visa-revised.pdf)
Additional
                                      Particular form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2BhntIo2MWlhYKr8q1K7Tt/3362dbee7c93ccf6aa053503397a0058/India-Particular-Form.pdf)
Annexure - B – Parental consent Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3fFFaktKavNa1CodcAiwoH/a1b339c0050743aac14d0b3e86d0f2d3/annexure-b-parental-consent-form.pdf)

## Processing Times
The processing time takes up to 24 working hours once the application reaches the Embassy/Consulate, but in some exceptional cases, it may take additional time.
